description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure rendered in a classical, ancient style, carved from a pale stone material. The figure stands upright with both arms at his sides, hands clenched into fists, and one leg slightly forward, suggesting a formal, almost rigid posture. The figure wears a short, pleated kilt and has a stylized, textured hairstyle or headdress. The back of the figure is supported by a vertical slab that extends from the base to above the head, a common feature in ancient statuary for structural support. The surface shows some discoloration and faint reddish-brown stains, possibly from age or weathering. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular base, which is integral to the piece.
description: A pale stone sculpture of a standing male figure in a pleated kilt, supported by a vertical slab and mounted on a rectangular base. The figure is rendered in a formal, ancient style with a rigid posture and stylized hair.
description_view_0: Side view showing the figure's profile, the vertical support slab, and the forward placement of one leg.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical stance, facial features, clenched fists, and pleated kilt.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, revealing the arm and leg positioning, as well as the support slab's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full height and width of the vertical support slab and the back of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
